name: Beer Batter Fish Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add beer until you achieve a sticky consistency for dipping.
3. Season the fish with salt and dip each fillet into the batter.
4. Deep fry at 375°F (190°C) until the fish is golden brown.
Note: Fillets of most fish including striped bass, flounder, catfish, walleye, white bass, black bass, snapper, redfish, grouper, and white perch will work.
